summary: Test suite covers core happy-path functionality (dependency parsing, license lookup, compliance checking, report generation) but has significant gaps. Missing tests for: empty/null dependencies, invalid JSON/config, alternative manifest formats (requirements.txt), scoped packages, empty allow/deny lists, all-denied/all-approved scenarios, invalid file paths, permission failures, and CSV format validation. Only one error case tested (missing manifest). Limited fixture reuse and no end-to-end integration test. Would catch basic regressions but miss edge cases and real-world error conditions.
